name: answer_pending_input
description: Answer a run that is paused on a human-input request (from list_pending_inputs).

name: create_agent
description: Get or create an agent by name: a cloud computer running plori's agent, with its own disk, tools, and memory.

name: create_workflow
description: Create an empty workflow (its steps are built separately by an agent).

name: delete_agent
description: Permanently delete an agent and revoke its disk.

name: get_agent
description: Get one agent's details (name, type, model, status) by its id.

name: get_credits
description: Get the authenticated account's credit balance and plan.

name: get_disk
description: Get the authenticated account's disk state (included, purchased, used bytes, and monthly cost).

name: get_run_result
description: Get a run's status and, if it has completed, the assistant's reply, plus a "url" that opens the run's session in the web app.

name: get_usage
description: Get the authenticated account's usage rollup (spend by meter and by agent, recent runs).

name: get_workflow_execution
description: Get one workflow execution's status, timing, credits, and per-step outcome.

name: invoke_agent
description: Send a message to an agent.

name: list_agents
description: List the agents owned by the authenticated account, with their model and live session status.

name: list_brains
description: List the agent type plori provides.

name: list_pending_inputs
description: List the agent's runs that are paused awaiting a human approval or input (the HITL queue).

name: list_runs
description: List an agent's run history (most recent first), with each run's status.

name: list_workflows
description: List the workflows owned by the authenticated account, with each one's status, trigger, and current version.

name: run_workflow
description: Run a workflow now — a real execution with real side effects, billed like any run (1 credit + model usage).

name: schedule_run
description: Schedule a deferred run of an agent: it will be invoked later with the given prompt.
